_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Strategic thinking involves creating a plan to achieve a team or organisation's objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to synthesize market trends, competitive intelligence, technology evolution, and organizational capability into coherent strategic recommendations that inform executive decision-making.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.387), LS-K-008 (LS, cosine: 0.364).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.331). Shared vocabulary: [strategic]. DDaT-only terms [achieve, creating, involves, objectives, organisation, plan] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, capability, coherent, competitive, decision, evolution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.880, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DDaT element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Strategic thinking involves creating a plan to achieve a team or organisation's" and "Ability to synthesize market trends, competitive intelligence, technology evolut" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.473 > STS 0.331 (gap +0.142). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [strategic] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.2%. Shared tokens: [strategic]. DDaT-only: [achieve, creating, involves, objectives, organisation, plan]. WIDAI-only: [ability, capability, coherent, competitive, decision, evolution].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.142 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
